description: Template (#363, feeds #360 Slice C 'pane plugins'): zero-permission capability for a future non-main webview. A plugin/non-main webview is untrusted, so it starts with nothing — copy this file, rename `identifier`, and point `windows`/`webviews` at the real plugin window's label before granting anything (a curated subset of the module sets under permissions/sets/ is the intended shape, never `main-ui`). The placeholder label below ("untrusted-probe-0") never exists in the shipped app and deliberately does NOT match the real "plugin-*" glob capabilities/plugin.json binds (#360 Slice C review, rev-65 NB-1) — a label matching that glob would also pick up the plugin-broker grant, diluting this file's zero-grant proof. tests/acl_manifest.rs opens a mock window with this label to prove the zero-grant deny is real (per-label, not global) using the app's actual resolved ACL. See doc/design/acl-manifest.md.
